parents.subject: LU-7782 scrub: handle slave obj of striped directory

commit.subject: LU-7746 tests: avoid DNE in sanity-scrub on one MDT
commit.message:
LU-7746 tests: avoid DNE in sanity-scrub on one MDT

Don't run DNE commands like "lfs mkdir -i" when running sanity-scrub
with only a single MDT.

Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
Change-Id: I6c808febe078fdc7afd89b82a04be62287990a48
